# Lucas Vaz — Art Director, Graphic Designer & Illustrator

> Senior creative with 19+ years of experience in art direction, graphic design, illustration, 2D animation and motion design. Based in Patos de Minas, Brazil. 100% remote. Fluent in English and Portuguese.

## About

Lucas Vaz is an independent art director, graphic designer, illustrator and 2D animator. He founded two creative studios (Agencia Dom Quixote, 2011-2014, and Studio Astronauta, 2014-2022) before joining New Vegas agency as Art Director for P&G brands (Gillette, Ariel, Downy, Oral-B) and Ketel One Botanical (Diageo). In 2024 he led design and animation at Ninety Eight, a Web3 creative agency. Currently freelance since 2025.

## Key achievements

- Art direction for Gillette, Ariel, Downy, Oral-B, and Ketel One through New Vegas (P&G agency)
- Launched Ketel One Botanical on Instagram and Facebook in Brazil
- 2D frame-by-frame animation for $BRETT that aired during the UEFA 2024 broadcast
- Billboards in Taiwan for $BRETT memecoin project
- 11 years running his own creative studios
- 19+ years of professional experience (since 2007)

## Services

- Art Direction & Creative Direction
- Brand Design & Visual Identity
- 2D Animation (frame-by-frame)
- Motion Design & Motion Graphics
- Illustration (editorial, brand, character)
- Social Media Art Direction
- UI/UX Design

## Availability

Open to: freelance projects, white-label studio work, retainers, day rates, or a senior full-time role at an international design/motion studio. Preferred payment in USD or EUR.
